UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GIUSTINO, STEFAN DBA RUPERT PUPKIN LLC. A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, MAURICIO DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR DEC-04-2002 - CASE DID NOT SETTLE. TRIAL DATE IS CONFIRMED. COMMISSIONER LORETTA M. NORRIS; CLERK: P. DIAS; REPORTER: DIANA PADILLA.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GIUSTINO, STEFAN DBA RUPERT PUPKIN LLC. A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, MAURICIO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1750 MISSION STREET #23 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL JAN-14-2002, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. IF DEFENDANT VACATES BY STAY DATE AND TIME, PLTF. WAIVES PAST DUE RENT AND DAILY DAMAGES. IF DEFT. FAILS TO VACATE BY DATE AND TIME, AMENDED JUDGMENT OF $846.92 IN UNPAID BACK RENT, AND COST OF $28.23 PER DAY FROM 12/1/02 TO 1/14/03 WILL BE DUE TOGETHER WITH COST OF $256.00 FOR TOTAL AMENDED JUDGMENT OF $2,413.27. SEC. DEP. FORFEITED TO PLTF. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COST AND ATTY. FEES. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR ADDED DETAILS. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER SANCHEZ, MAURICIO ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR DEC-09-2002 - CASE SETTLED.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-09-2002 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Diana Padilla. Arnold W. Evje, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, Stefan Giustino and Defendant, Mauricio Sanchez appeared in pro per. The matter did not settle and the trial date is confirmed.
